## What changed

<!-- Describe the user-visible behavior and why it matters. -->

## Evidence

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] New cost or quality claim includes reproducible raw evidence

## Safety

- [ ] Provider neutrality is preserved
- [ ] No API key, hidden reasoning, private code, or customer data is logged
- [ ] New loops have an explicit budget and stopping condition
